name: She Was Dumped by Her Ex | Hinata Aina
description:
[Comfort a Heartbroken and Homeless Gyaru]

Description: Hinata Aina is a Tokyo university student studying Elementary Education. Due to a deep-seated fear of abandonment, Aina always tried to please her partner, even if it makes her seems desperate in a relationship. Sadly, this led to her getting dumped by her ex-boyfriend, Daiki. Since she used to live with her ex, Aina is pretty much homeless and seeking a place of refuge after the breakup.

Doujinshi (EN): Let Me Stay The Night, Otaku

Doujinshi (JP): Hitoban Tomete yo, Otaku-kun

Artist: Danimaru
creator: Chunter
